Title: Networking Habits Audit
Description: Reflect on your current networking activity and identify the habits and mindsets holding you back from building a stronger professional network.
SchemaJson: {"id":"networking_habits_v1","title":"Networking Habits Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How comfortable do you feel reaching out to people you do not know professionally?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"How often do you proactively reach out to new professional contacts?","options":["Several times a week","Once a week","A few times a month","Rarely","Never"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Where do you primarily network?","options":["LinkedIn","In-person events and meetups","Industry conferences","Through mutual connections","I do not currently network"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How well do you maintain relationships with existing professional contacts?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What makes professional networking feel difficult or uncomfortable for you?","required":false}]}
